game.title: Godfather's Table
howto.ch1.title: Overview & Your Family
howto.ch1.objective: Each player commands a crime family fighting for control of the city. Collect cash, eliminate rivals, and control businesses. The player with the most money when the bank runs dry wins — even if their family was wiped out.
howto.ch1.family.title: Your Family
howto.ch1.godfather.name: The Godfather
howto.ch1.godfather.desc: Earns $1,000 every round he stays alive. Protect him at all costs.
howto.ch1.gunman.name: Gunman
howto.ch1.gunman.desc: Shoots the rival sitting directly across the table. Cannot fire from corner seats.
howto.ch1.bladeslinger.name: Blade Slinger
howto.ch1.bladeslinger.desc: Eliminates the rival sitting immediately to his left or right.
howto.ch1.thug.name: Thug
howto.ch1.thug.desc: A flexible enforcer. Can wield any weapon, acting like whichever gangster is needed.
howto.ch1.tip.label: Tip:
howto.ch1.tip.body: Positioning is everything. A Gunman in a corner is useless. A Blade Slinger next to an enemy Godfather is devastating.
howto.ch2.title: Turn Sequence & Income
howto.ch2.turn.title: Each Turn, In Order
howto.ch2.income.title: Income Sources (Step 2)
howto.ch2.income.godfather: Your Godfather is alive on the board → $1,000
howto.ch2.income.business: Each business spot you control (Bar, Restaurant, Casino) → $1,000
howto.ch2.income.monopoly: Both spots of the same business type (monopoly) → $4,000 total
howto.ch2.income.register: One gangster at the Cash Register → all your income this round is doubled
howto.ch3.title: Action Cards
howto.ch4.title: Winning the Game
howto.ch4.end.title: The Game Ends When
howto.ch4.winner.label: Winner:
howto.ch4.winner.body: The player with the most cash — even if eliminated before the game ends.
howto.ch4.tiebreaker.label: Tiebreaker:
howto.ch4.tiebreaker.body: If two or more players are tied, the winner is the one whose gangsters survived the longest.
howto.card.KNIFE.name: Knife
howto.card.KNIFE.desc: Eliminate a rival to the immediate left or right of one of your Blade Slingers, or next to any gangster sitting in front of a knife icon on the board.
howto.card.GUN.name: Gun
howto.card.GUN.desc: Eliminate a rival sitting directly across from one of your Gunmen, or across from any gangster in front of a revolver icon. Corner seats block the line of sight.
howto.card.ORDER_CAKE.name: Order a Cake
howto.card.ORDER_CAKE.desc: Place your cake on any spot — even one already occupied. It explodes at the start of your next turn, eliminating gangsters in front, left, and right of it.
howto.card.PASS_CAKE.name: Pass Cake
howto.card.PASS_CAKE.desc: Shove an opponent's cake one spot to the left or right. Redirect the explosion into someone else — or away from your crew.
howto.card.EXPLODE_CAKE.name: Explode Cake
howto.card.EXPLODE_CAKE.desc: Detonate an opponent's cake immediately and out of turn. Eliminates gangsters in front, left, and right of it.
howto.card.SLEEPING_PILL.name: Sleeping Pill
howto.card.SLEEPING_PILL.desc: Drug up to three opponents whose gangsters sit in front of a glass icon. They're out for a round. A second pill on the same gangster eliminates them permanently.
howto.card.POLICE_RAID.name: Police Raid
howto.card.POLICE_RAID.desc: All players pull every gangster off the board, then reposition them on free seats one by one. You go first. No one is eliminated — just reshuffled. Cakes stay in place.
howto.card.DISPLACEMENT.name: Displacement
howto.card.DISPLACEMENT.desc: Move one of your gangsters to any free seat. Can be played alongside an action card, or play two Displacement cards instead of an action card.
howto.turn.0.label: 💥 Explode your cake
howto.turn.0.desc: If you placed a cake last turn, it detonates now — eliminating gangsters in front, to the left, and to the right of it.
howto.turn.1.label: 💰 Receive Cash
howto.turn.1.desc: Collect income from the bank. See income sources below.
howto.turn.2.label: 🃏 Play Cards
howto.turn.2.desc: Play one action card. Optionally also play one Displacement card. You may discard one card instead if you have no useful play. Draw back up to five cards automatically.
howto.turn.3.label: ⏰ Wake up!
howto.turn.3.desc: Remove sleeping pill tokens from your gangsters — they return to play for your next turn.
howto.end.rule.0: Only one player has gangsters left — they take all remaining money in the bank.
howto.end.rule.1: The bank is empty — no more money to pay out.
howto.end.rule.2: The last gangsters on the board are wiped out by a single explosion.

game.no_gangsters: No valid gangsters. Cancel and try another card.

game.select_cake_explode: Select a cake bomb to explode

game.gun.confirm_target: Confirm to shoot the gangster in front

game.ordercake.select: Select a position to place a cake bomb

game.second_disp: Play a displacement card as your second action?
game.discard.hint: You'll draw a new card to replace it
game.pills.1: Select a gangster to put to sleep (1 of up to 3)
game.pills.hint: Click a highlighted gangster on the board
game.pills.detail: {{count}} gangster(s) will be put to sleep
game.seating.gangster.hint: Click a blinking gangster icon in the panel on the right
game.seating.seat.hint: Click a highlighted seat on the board
game.seating.confirm.hint: Place the gangster in the selected seat
game.wrapup.title: Your crew has been wiped out
game.wrapup.body: Skip to the final results — you can still win if you've collected more money than anyone else.
card.desc.KNIFE: Slash a gangster immediately to your left or right. If the adjacent seat is occupied by an enemy, they are eliminated and removed from the board. Your gangster must be alive and seated to use this card.
card.desc.GUN: Shoot the gangster sitting directly across the table from yours. If the opposite seat is occupied, they are eliminated. If the seat is empty, the shot misses — but the card is still spent.
card.desc.DISPLACEMENT: Move one of your gangsters from their current seat to any unoccupied seat on the board. Can also be used as a second action after your first play — if you have a Displacement card in hand after playing another card, you get the option to move.
card.desc.ORDER_CAKE: Place a cake bomb on any seat on the board. The bomb is armed this round and will automatically explode at the start of your NEXT turn, eliminating anyone seated to the left, right, and center of the blast. Plan ahead — your own gangsters can be caught in the blast.
card.desc.PASS_CAKE: Nudge an existing cake bomb one seat to the left or right. Use this to redirect a bomb toward an enemy, or push it away from your own gangsters before it explodes.
card.desc.EXPLODE_CAKE: Manually trigger a cake bomb right now — no waiting for next round. The explosion hits the center seat and both adjacent seats. Any gangster caught in the blast is eliminated. Great for a surprise strike.
card.desc.POLICE_RAID: The cops show up and clear the entire board. Every gangster is removed and all players must re-seat their gang from scratch, in turn order starting with you. Powerful for disrupting strong positions. WARNING: this card is permanently removed from the deck once played — it will not be reshuffled.
card.desc.SLEEPING_PILLS: Drug up to 3 enemy gangsters sitting at bar or drink seats. Sleeping gangsters skip their turn but stay on the board. They wake up at the end of their owner's next turn. Useful for neutralizing threats without eliminating them.
results.subtitle: The Family Has Spoken
results.title: Final Results
confirm.restart.title: Restart Game?
confirm.restart.msg: All progress will be lost. The family will have to start over.
confirm.mp.msg: This will end the game for all players and redirect everyone to the menu.
confirm.leave.title: Leave Game?
confirm.leave.msg: You sure you want to leave the table?
log.ordercake: {{actor}} team orders a cake bomb at seat {{pos}}
log.policeraid: {{actor}} team triggers Police Raid — all gangsters cleared!
